title: White Plastic Traditional Desserts Cake Stand Plate Display
description: Product Description Display your show-stopping cakes with pride with this beautiful cake stand! Whether for a tea party or a special occasion, this cake stand will beautifully support your big bakes. The simple, traditional design ensures that any cake will look outstanding on this display stand. This lovely stand is perfect for putting cakes, muffins, cupcakes, cookies or fruits. Material: Re-usable Plastic. Height approximately 17cm. Diameter approximately 28cm.
